profile.name: Alex Morgan
profile.summary: Senior business strategy executive with 12+ years leading planning, analysis, and revenue strategy across enterprise SaaS and cloud technology. Track record of building strategic planning functions, driving pricing and packaging optimization, and delivering long-range planning that accelerates revenue growth. Combines deep financial acumen with cross-functional leadership to shape business models, monetization strategy, and go-to-market execution at scale.

evidence.outcome: Built and led enterprise strategic planning function serving $4B business unit with 3-year rolling plans
Developed long-range planning (LRP) framework adopted across 5 business units, improving forecast accuracy by 28%
Led annual business planning cycle for $2.1B cloud division, aligning 12 product lines to corporate growth targets
Created quarterly business review framework tracking 25 KPIs across revenue, margin, and operational efficiency
Built scenario planning models evaluating $500M+ investment decisions with sensitivity analysis across 12 variables
Developed pricing elasticity models that informed 15% ARPU increase without material churn impact
Designed cloud monetization strategy that accelerated subscription revenue growth from 18% to 34% YoY
Led pricing and packaging transformation across enterprise product portfolio, contributing $180M incremental ARR
Built executive analytics dashboards tracking 30+ KPIs powering real-time decision-making for C-suite
Led market sizing and TAM analysis for 3 new product categories totaling $8B addressable market
Led cross-functional team of 40+ across finance, product, engineering, and sales for annual planning cycle
Facilitated executive alignment on $300M investment portfolio across competing business unit priorities
Regular presenter to CEO and CFO on business performance, strategic initiatives, and investment recommendations
Managed board-level reporting on strategic initiatives with quarterly cadence
Led cloud pricing transformation from perpetual license to consumption-based model across 8 product SKUs
Developed competitive pricing intelligence program tracking 15 competitors across 4 market segments
Conducted comprehensive competitive landscape analysis across 20 vendors informing M&A strategy
Designed and executed GTM strategy for new cloud product achieving 200% of first-year revenue target ($45M)
Delivered 15+ cross-functional strategic initiatives on time and within budget over 3 years
Presented strategic recommendations to audiences of 500+ at Dreamforce and industry conferences
Authored executive briefings and investment memos for C-suite decision-making
Built strategy and planning team from 3 to 15 members across 3 offices with 92% retention
Identified and structured 4 strategic partnership deals generating $50M in combined pipeline
Led P&L analysis across 8 product lines identifying $40M in margin improvement opportunities
Built ROI frameworks for strategic investments that secured $200M+ in board-approved funding
Led pricing model transition from perpetual to subscription affecting 2,000+ enterprise accounts
Negotiated enterprise contracts totaling $75M+ with Fortune 500 clients
Identified revenue leakage of $12M annually and designed remediation plan recovering 85% within 2 quarters
Delivered board presentations that secured approval for 5 strategic initiatives totaling $150M investment
Managed $25M annual operating budget with consistent under-budget delivery (avg 3% savings)
Implemented RevOps framework aligning sales, marketing, and CS metrics to unified revenue dashboard
Redesigned strategic planning cycle reducing timeline from 16 weeks to 8 weeks while improving quality
Identified market timing risk that prevented $50M investment in declining product category, redirecting to cloud-first strategy
Led cloud migration strategy for enterprise product suite, growing cloud revenue from 25% to 60% of total
Managed product portfolio of 6 enterprise cloud products with combined $800M ARR
Built competitive intelligence program tracking 20 vendors across 4 market categories with monthly executive briefs
Designed and delivered monthly executive business reviews for CEO, CFO, and 8 SVPs covering $4B portfolio
Developed revenue forecasting models achieving 95%+ accuracy across quarterly and annual horizons
Designed consumption-based pricing model for platform products, increasing expansion revenue by 45%
Established ISV partner program generating $30M in indirect revenue through 25 technology partnerships

workHistory.title: VP, Business Strategy & Planning
workHistory.description: Lead business strategy and long-range planning for $4B cloud platform division. Own pricing strategy, monetization framework, and strategic planning cycle. Manage team of 15 across strategy, analytics, and competitive intelligence. Regular presenter to CEO and board on strategic initiatives and investment recommendations.

workHistory.title: Senior Director, Revenue Strategy & Planning
workHistory.description: Led revenue strategy and business planning for cloud analytics platform. Drove pricing transformation from perpetual to subscription model. Built planning function from scratch, delivering quarterly business reviews and annual strategic plans for C-suite.

workHistory.title: Director, Strategic Planning & Analysis
workHistory.description: Led strategic planning and financial analysis for enterprise software division. Developed scenario planning models, managed $25M operating budget, and drove cross-functional alignment on product investment priorities.

workHistory.title: Senior Strategy Analyst
workHistory.description: Strategy consulting focused on technology and SaaS clients. Led market sizing, competitive analysis, and growth strategy engagements for Fortune 500 technology companies.
